items.title: PR branch merges current dev/dave without unresolved conflicts
items.precondition: Worktree is /Users/rustinedave/Desktop/alloro-pr153-fix on codex/pr153-fix after merging origin/dev/dave into the PR branch.
steps: 1. Run git merge origin/dev/dave from the PR branch.
items.expected: No unresolved merge conflicts remain and whitespace checks pass.
items.evidence: git merge origin/dev/dave completed after resolving the five conflict files; git diff --check exited 0.
items.notes: Resolved dashboard/ranking/Summary conflicts by preserving current dev/dave guarded contracts.

items.title: Choosable metrics remain behind the guarded service path
items.precondition: Dashboard metrics conflict resolution is applied.
steps: 1. Search dashboard metrics utilities for buildChoosableMetrics, LocationCompetitorModel, and medianOf.
items.expected: The stale utility helper is gone and the org/location-guarded service remains the only dashboard assembly path.
items.evidence: rg found no stale helper in sectionBuilders.ts; service.dashboard-metrics.ts imports and calls ChoosableMetricsService.build.

items.title: Type checks and targeted backend tests pass
items.precondition: Dependencies installed with npm ci in the clean worktree.
steps: 2. Run the focused Vitest set for review replies, ranking guardrails, Summary validators, Choosable metrics, and dashboard metrics.
items.expected: TypeScript exits 0 and the focused test set passes.
items.evidence: npx tsc --noEmit exited 0; focused Vitest reported 5 files passed and 24 tests passed.

items.title: Frontend build and touched frontend tests pass
steps: 3. Run cd frontend && npm run build.
items.expected: Frontend lint has no errors, touched tests pass, and production build completes.
items.evidence: frontend eslint --quiet exited 0; OsCommandPalette.test.tsx reported 3 tests passed; frontend build exited 0.
items.notes: Build still prints existing Vite chunk/eval warnings.

items.title: Code Constitution gate has no blocking failures
steps: 2. Review backend strict convention output, lint output, frontend lint output, and depcruise output.
items.expected: No blocking convention, lint, or dependency-cruiser errors remain.
items.evidence: npm run check:all exited 0; frontend lint reported 0 errors after fixes; depcruise reported 0 errors and 38 warnings.
items.notes: Existing advisory findings remain: §17.4 dangerouslySetInnerHTML, §17.5 token reads in tests, §10.2 raw DB use in integration tests, §11.7 heuristic tenant-scope list, and baseline lint/dependency warnings.

items.title: Generic ranking titles retain position-aware action copy
items.precondition: Rev 1 generic-title fallback guard is applied.
steps: 1. Run the ranking dashboard utility test file.
2. Verify leader, top-three, ranked, outside-top-20, and pending bands.
items.expected: Generic post/review titles use the band-aware fallback while specific generated titles remain eligible for direct display.
items.notes: This closes the full-suite regression found after the original PR-153 acceptance.
